absorb_workflow.source: sz absorb draft plus deterministic protocol adapter

behaviors: read shared dashboard/session JSON if present
summarize active tasks, sessions, and installed module health
write a module-private dashboard summary for UI adapters
public_purpose: Builds a dashboard health snapshot from generic session, action-card, and module state files.
reconstruction: Protocol-native behavior was re-derived from the source candidate and hardened into an anonymized System Zero module.
source_summary: keywords: agent, autonomous, maintenance, dashboard, monitor, launchd, 24/7
